objects.name: Pulsedive
objects.description: Pulsedive is an analyst-centric threat intelligence platform built with on-demand scanning for live data, risk scoring to reduce false positives, and powerful integration capabilities for leveraging Pulsedive data inside your organization.

objects.name: Pulsedive Indicator Extension
objects.description: This schema adds Pulsedive-specific properties to Indicator objects.

objects.name: Detection Pattern
objects.description: Very low risk of malicious activity.
